channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Xenoblade Chronicles series Nintendo Switch 2 Editions announced
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition - Nintendo Switch 2 Edition out now.

Publisher Nintendo and developer Monolith Soft have released Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition via Nintendo eShop for $69.99. Users who own the Switch version can purchase an “Upgrade Pack” for $9.99. A physical edition will launch on July 30 for $69.99.

Publisher Nintendo and developer Monolith Soft have announced Nintendo Switch 2 Edition versions of the Xenoblade Chronicles games, starting with Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, which is available now via Nintendo eShop.

The release schedule for each game is as follows:

  • Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition
    • Digital: June 9, 2026
    • Physical: July 30, 2026
  • Xenoblade Chronicles 2 – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition
    • Digital: July 30, 2026
    • Physical: October 1, 2026
  • Xenoblade Chronicles 3 – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition
    • Digital: December 3, 2026
    • Physical: December 3, 2026

Here is an overview of each game, via Nintendo:

Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

  • ❮
  • ❯

About

Join the fight between man and machine in this critically acclaimed RPG—now enhanced for the Nintendo Switch 2 system!
Discover the origins of Shulk as he and his companions clash against a seemingly unstoppable mechanical menace. Wield a future-seeing blade, chain together attacks, and carefully position your party members in strategic, real-time combat. Journey across a massive world that has been enhanced to run at 4K* resolution in TV mode, and full HD in handheld mode, at 60 frames per second—with smoother and sharper cutscenes.

This Nintendo Switch 2 Edition game contains all the additions and improvements of Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition on the Nintendo Switch system, including the extended story of Xenoblade Chronicles: Future Connected (which has also been enhanced), remixed and remastered music tracks, better quest tracking, and more. It also includes some additional content for you to enjoy!

Race Across the Bionis and Mechonis on a High-powered Vehicle

Introducing the Ether Jet: a vehicle that will greatly enhance the speed at which you can traverse the Bionis and Mechonis, both in the main game and in the Future Connected story. But this is not just a convenience feature—you can also race competitively against the clock or your party members at racetracks throughout the world and earn in-game rewards in the process.

Unlock Additional Equipment, Experience Fully Voiced Heart-to-Heart Conversations, and More

Get equipment made for riding the Ether Jet, and experience improved Heart-to-Heart scenes with fully voiced dialogue for the first time!

Nintendo Switch 2 Features

  • Experience Shulk’s battle against a seemingly insurmountable mechanical menace in 4K resolution in TV mode, and full HD in handheld mode, at 60 frames per second.
  • Traverse the Bionis and Mechonis, two titans frozen in battle, at high speed on the Ether Jet. Get additional equipment made specifically for riding the Ether Jet.
  • The Xenoblade Chronicles: Future Connected story has also been enhanced with visual improvements and the Ether Jet.
  • Experience fully voiced Heart-to-Heart conversations for the first time.

View a set of screenshots at the gallery.

Xenoblade Chronicles 2 – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

  • ❮
  • ❯

About

Lead Rex, Pyra, and the world to refuge in an adventure enhanced for the Nintendo Switch 2 system!

Lost in a sea of clouds, entire civilizations rest on the backs of Titans. As the giant beasts march toward death, the last hope is a scavenger named Rex—and Pyra, a living weapon known as a Blade. Command a group of Blades and lead them to countless strategic victories as you search for the fabled paradise Pyra calls home. This journey has been enhanced with 4K* resolution in TV mode, and full HD in handheld mode, at 60 frames per second—and with smoother and sharper cutscenes.

Discover a new rare Blade—and control your Blades to fight in mercenary squad battles

Not only is there an additional Blade out there for you to find—along with a quest to complete—but you can directly command your Blades in a new action battle mode!

Unlock new equipment designs for Pyra and Mythra

Customize the look of Pyra and Mythra with new equipment designs exclusive to this Nintendo Switch 2 Edition game.

Nintendo Switch 2 Features

  • Experience a journey across Titans in 4K resolution in TV mode, and full HD in handheld mode, at 60 frames per second.
  • Discover a new rare Blade, complete with a quest for you to take on. Directly control the Blades you send on mercenary missions in a new action battle mode.
  • Unlock new equipment designs for Pyra and Mythra.

View a set of screenshots at the gallery.

Xenoblade Chronicles 3 – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

  • ❮
  • ❯

About

Live to fight. Fight to live. Now with enhancements for the Nintendo Switch 2 system.

Join Noah and Mio, members of the two opposing nations of Keves and Agnus, on a heartfelt journey through a warring world with a dark secret. Traverse massive, fantastical landscapes and master seamless real-time RPG combat that has all been enhanced to run at 4K* resolution in TV mode, and full HD in handheld mode, at 60 frames per second with smoother and sharper cutscenes.

This Nintendo Switch 2 Edition also includes some additional content! Recruit a new Hero—complete with an additional quest—and put your strength to the test against waves of enemies in a new defensive battle mode. The game also features newly voiced event scenes.

Nintendo Switch 2 Features

  • Traverse massive, fantastical landscapes in 4K resolution in TV mode, and full HD in handheld mode, at 60 frames per second.
  • Recruit a new Hero, complete with a quest for you to take on.
  • Put your strength to the test in defensive battles against waves of enemies.
  • Experience fully voiced event scenes.

View a set of screenshots at the gallery.

Watch a set of announcement trailers below.

Series Announce Trailer

English

Japanese

Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition Overview Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/xenoblade-chronicles-series-nintendo-switch-2-editions-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Nintendo Switch Sports Resort announced for Switch 2
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Due out on October 22.

Nintendo has announced Nintendo Switch Sports Resort for Switch 2. It will launch on October 22. Digital pre-orders are available now for $49.99.

Here is an overview of the game, via Nintendo:

About

Get up and move in 12 motion-control sports!

Gently swing your racket, pull back and aim like an archer, and more in 12 sports with intuitive motion controls.

Move together in sports like Bowling and Basketball, duke it out in Boxing, and even battle with one thumb in Thumb Wrestling—there are lots of ways to compete and have fun together!

Explore the island getaway using Joy-Con™ 2 mouse controls in Skateboarding, steer across the waves in Power Cruising, and tilt the controller to fly around freely in Prop Plane.

Create and customize your Sportsmate or Mii characters, and jump into the fun online or offline in Nintendo Switch Sports Resort!

Details about how many people can play together online will be provided in the future.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Included Sports

  • Archery
  • Basketball
  • Bowling
  • Boxing
  • Golf
  • Power Cruising
  • Prop Plane
  • Skateboarding
  • Table Tennis
  • Tennis
  • Thumb Wrestling
  • Volleyball

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/nintendo-switch-sports-resort-announced-for-switch-2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Derby Stallion 2 announced for Switch 2
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Due out on September 24 in Japan.

GAME ADDICT and ParityBit have announced racehorse training simulation game sequel Derby Stallion 2 for Switch 2. It will launch both physically and digitally on September 24 in Japan for 9,980 yen.

The original Derby Stallion launched for Switch on December 3, 2020 in Japan.

In Derby Stallion 2, as the owner of a small ranch, players will begin with a single broodmare, planning matings and breeding foals. While training their stable, players will raise their horses and send them out to compete in races. Through repeated breeding, raising, and training, and by carrying their bloodlines on to future generations, players will aim to create the ultimate “thoroughbred” horse.

Watch the announcement trailer below. Visit the official website here.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/derby-stallion-2-announced-for-switch-2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Ninjala 2: The Uncharted Planet announced for Switch 2
item.content:encoded:
GungHo Online Entertainment has announced Ninjala 2: The Uncharted Planet for Switch 2. It will launch exclusively for the platform in spring 2027.

The first demo of the game will be playable at Anime Expo 2026, which will run from July 2 to 5 at the Los Angeles Convention Center. The demo will feature two playable courses: a Planetary Exploration Course showcasing the game’s combat, and a Photography Course that lets players go on a sightseeing adventure. Everyone who plays the demo will receive a limited-edition keepsake.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Here is an overview of the game, via GungHo Online Entertainment:

About

Ninjala 2: The Uncharted Planet marks a new frontier for the series, transforming the original Ninjala‘s high-energy player-versus-player into an open-world action game. Players will traverse vast, nature-rich landscapes at their own pace, with the franchise’s high-speed Ninja-Gum Action combat driving every encounter. Along the way, master the power of the Shinobi to conquer dungeons and take down colossal bosses across an undiscovered world.

Ninjala 2: The Uncharted Planet is told in an ambitious two-part story. The Uncharted Planet is the first installment, setting the stage for an epic narrative that will continue in a second chapter at a later date.

An Uncharted World Awaits

The adventure begins at the WNA Academy when a mysterious stranger manipulates the protagonist into breaking the Forbidden Seal. As the entire Academy is transported across the stars to a strange planet, the sinister Prime Tetrad of the Xenos Army is simultaneously unleashed. Now stranded on an uncharted world, the protagonist must work together with their allies to find their way back home to Earth, uncovering their own destiny that lies dormant deep within them along the way.

Key Features

  • From Player-Versus-Player to Open-World Player-Versus-Environment – While preserving the fast-paced Ninja-Gum Action gameplay that fans love, Ninjala 2: The Uncharted Planet expands the setting into an open world where players can freely explore and tackle quest-driven challenges in any order. The combat builds on Ninjala‘s core mechanics with weapon attributes, an item crafting system, and a cooking system using gathered materials.
  • Solo or Cooperative Play – Experience the journey at your own pace as a solo player, or team up with up to four friends in local or online cooperative play. Coordinate with your squad to conquer dungeons and take on colossal bosses together.
  • New Protagonists and Familiar Faces – Players step into the shoes of a young ninja student attending the WNA Academy. Fan-favorite characters from the original Ninjala—including Lucy, Berecca, Van, and more—return alongside new characters.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/ninjala-2-the-uncharted-planet-announced-for-switch-2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Metaphor: ReFantazio coming to Switch 2 on November 12
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

The acclaimed ATLUS RPG.

ATLUS will release acclaimed RPG Metaphor: ReFantazio for Switch 2 on November 12, the developer announced. The physical edition will ship on a game-key card. In the west, a SteelBook Edition will be available for a limited time at launch.

Metaphor: ReFantazio first launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store on October 11, 2024.

Here is an overview of the game, via ATLUS:

About

From the creative minds behind Persona 3, Persona 4, and Persona 5 comes Metaphor: ReFantazio, a unique fantasy world, where your protagonist will journey alongside his fairy companion, Gallica, to lift the curse from the kingdom’s lost prince. Control your destiny, face your fears and awaken magical “Archetype” powers that lie dormant in your heart. By awakening to an “Archetype,” you will unlock the power to channel and combine the abilities of unique job classes. Strengthen your bonds and build your party to take down powerful foes and discover the kingdom’s true nature.

Key Features

  • Go on quests, dungeon dive, and hunt for treasures by day. Strengthen relationships, build bonds, and increase virtues by night. Choose your actions wisely, time management is key to achieving your goal.
  • Ride your “gauntlet runner” to faraway dungeons and towns across an expansive world. Discover beautiful landscapes  accompanied by captivating music, an immersive user interface, and anime cutscenes.
  • A unique battle system combining turn-based and real time action grants strategy and exhilaration at every turn. Party customization through “Archetypes” provides freedom to personalize your adventure.
  • A mysterious and exciting story unfolds in a world where people must fight their own anxiety. Join the high-stakes Royal Tournament that promises hours of captivating exploration and discovery.

Watch a new trailer below. Visit the Switch 2 version’s official website here: English / English Asia / Japanese.

Switch 2 Announce Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/metaphor-refantazio-coming-to-switch-2-on-november-12
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Deltarune Chapter 5 launches June 24
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

What kind of Chapter awaits...?

DELTARUNE Chapter 5 will launch PlayStation 5, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam on June 24 at 8:00 a.m. PT / 11:00 a.m. ET, creator tobyfox announced.

In a newsletter, tobyfox shared the latest details:

What kind of Chapter is Chapter 5?

In Chapter 4, we saw dark clouds on the horizon…

That’s why, let’s not look there for now. Let’s turn around and watch the sun, before it goes down completely.

Let’s smile again.

Let’s have one more fun adventure, okay?

…

In my opinion, it fits well in the overall story of the game.

Chapter 6 Progress Update

Chapter 6 is developing well.

  • Cutscenes / NPC interactions: Making good progress.
  • Overworld gameplay: We’ve created all the basic gimmicks of the chapter. (Gimmick = climbing, puzzles, etc.) Now, we need to create a few more rooms utilizing these gimmicks.
  • Normal enemies & bullets: Mostly complete.
  • Boss and bullets: We are working on the bullets of the last battle of the chapter.

This Chapter is easier to make than the others, so the development is going quite fast.

This sounds crazy, but it’s not unrealistic that some staff members may start working on Chapter 7 before the end of the year.

Watch a new trailer below.

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/deltarune-chapter-5-launches-june-24
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Fire Emblem: Fortune’s Weave launches September 17
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

The Heroic Games are about to begin!

Fire Emblem: Fortune’s Weave will launch for Switch 2 on September 17 for $69.99 digitally and $79.99 physically, publisher Nintendo and developer Intelligent Systems announced.

A “Dagdan Collection” special edition will also be available for $119.99, which includes a SteelBook case, set of character art cards, map of Dagda, and a 200-page art book.

Here is an overview of the game, via Nintendo:

About

The Heroic Games are about to begin!

Enter the Dagdan Empire—a prosperous land ruled by the gods—and compete in the Heroic Games for the chance to be granted one wish. Powerful fighters from across the land have gathered to participate, including four heroes whose fortunes are tied to the fate of the world.

Play as Cai, a young boy determined to win the games to save his imprisoned father; Dietrich, a swordsman ever on the hunt for a stronger foe; Theodora, a queen seeking to fulfill the long-held dream of her homeland; and Leda, a musician with her sights set on revenge. The stories of these four heroes are key to this time-traveling saga of strength and steel.

Guide your heroes to victory as each weaves their own tale

Prepare for each match of the Heroic Games by exploring Dagda and its capital city of Dagsion. Learn techniques and hone skills at the training grounds, recruit allies and build bonds of friendship, and explore beyond Dagsion’s walls to gain experience and strengthen your forces in a variety of ways. How you spend your free time is up to you, but the tactical matches of the Games themselves will put your preparations to the test. Use everything you have at your disposal, including your heroes’ special abilities, to turn the tide of battle!

  • ❮
  • ❯

Enter the Heroic Games

Worthy fighters from all over the land have come to Dagsion, the capital city of the Dagdan Empire, to compete in the Heroic Games for the chance to win one wish. Among the combatants are four heroes tied to the fate of the world. Whose fortune will lead them to victory?

Meet the contenders

Follow the four heroes on their separate paths to winning the Heroic Games and fulfilling their wish.

  • Cai – A young boy determined to save his father from imprisonment.
  • Dietrich – A ruthless swordsman ever on the hunt for a stronger foe.
  • Theodora – A queen seeking to fulfill the long-held dream of her homeland.
  • Leda – A talented musician with her sights set on taking her revenge.

Ready Your Forces

Between matches, you can explore the world to strengthen your army and find resources. Train and recruit allies in Dagsion, or venture out into the land to fight bandits and monsters, delve through dungeons, and more. You have limited time to prepare, so make every action count.

Lead Your Army Into Battle

Command your units in strategic, turn-based combat against the enemy. Use everything in your arsenal to turn the tide, including your heroes’ special abilities. By learning the strengths and weaknesses of your units and directing them wisely, you just might gain the upper hand.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Release Date Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/fire-emblem-fortunes-weave-launches-september-17
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Lies of P: Complete Edition coming to Switch 2 on August 6
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Includes the base game and downloadable content "Overture."

Publisher NEOWIZ and developer Round8 Studio will release Soulslike action RPG Lies of P: Complete Edition for Switch 2 on August 6, the companies announced.

Lies of P first launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, PC via Steam and Microsoft Store, and Mac via Mac App Store on September 19, 2023, and has sold over four million units.

Lies of P: Complete Edition includes the base game and the downloadable content expansion “Overture,” which is already available on existing platforms.

“Finally, we are able to share Lies of P will be coming to Nintendo platforms for the first time with Lies of P: Complete Edition coming to Nintendo Switch 2 later this year,” said Lies of P director Jiwon Choi in a press release. “We’ve wanted to share our beautiful, dark take on Pinocchio’s story with Nintendo players for a long time and are excited to have them join the passionate and enthusiastic player community that have flocked to the game since its original release in 2023.”

Here are the latest details, via NEOWIZ:

With over four million cumulative units sold globally, Lies of P and Lies of P: Overture have been well received and created a passionate player community that has resonated with the adventures of Gepetto’s Puppet and the characters who reside in the city of Krat. Developed by ROUND8 Studio and published by NEOWIZ, the game and its accompanying DLC have come to be known as best-in-class and award-winning experiences in the Soulslike subgenre, and have grown NEOWIZ’s position in the global games market.

Lies of P: Complete Edition will be available for $69.99 on Nintendo Switch 2. Players can pre-order the game now on the Nintendo eShop (North America, Europe) digitally. In addition to the digital version, iam8bit is releasing a physical version that includes the full base game and downloadable content on the cartridge.

NEOWIZ has also partnered with iam8bit on a collection of special Lies of P releases available now for pre-order. Leading the lineup is the Lies of P: Complete Edition iam8bit Edition for Nintendo Switch 2, featuring the full Lies of P: Overture downloadable content and six Boss Lore Cards highlighting the strange foes P encounters on his journey, available at retailers worldwide. Fans can also pre-order the iam8bit Exclusive Edition, which includes all Retail Edition contents plus a stunning o-sleeve showcasing artwork from the NEOWIZ team.

Also available for pre-order is Round8 Studio’s evocative music from Lies of P and Lies of P: Overture with the Lies of P three-disc CD set and the Lies of P: Overture two-disc CD set, both packaged in premium digipaks featuring original artwork by Dan Zollinger.

Additional collectibles available for pre-order now through July 13 include the Butterfly Brooch ($14.99), Amulet Keychain Blind Bag, Boss Rush Pin Set, and a handcrafted Marionette Puppet, each inspired by the world of Lies of P.

For hardcore Lies of P fanatics and collectors looking to own it all, iam8bit is offering three tiered bundles: the Amulet Keychain Blind Bag Bundle, which includes all five amulet keychains; the Lies of P: Complete Edition bundle, which includes the Nintendo Switch 2 exclusive edition along with all five keychains, the Boss Rush Pin Set, and the glow-in-the-dark Butterfly Brooch; and the Lies of P: Complete Edition Marionette Bundle, which includes everything in the Complete Edition Bundle plus a specially handcrafted, wood-carved Marionette Puppet made by the Czech artisans at Rici Marionettes.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Switch 2 Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/lies-of-p-complete-edition-coming-to-switch-2-on-august-6
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Nobunaga’s Ambition: Hishou announced for PS5, Switch 2, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Due out this winter in Japan and Asia.

Publisher Koei Tecmo and developer Kou Shibusawa have announced historical simulation game Nobunaga’s Ambition: Hishou for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, Switch, and PC (Steam). It will launch this winter in Japan and Asia. A western release was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Koei Tecmo:

Live, in the name of Justice.

What is it that warriors fight for?

Each warrior of the Warring States period had their own reasons for riding into battle—be it territory, social standing, the sake of humanity, or their own ambition. This title focuses on those reasons, with battles between evenly matched warriors and an exploration of the bonds between ally and enemy.

Enjoy a full revival of the city development portion of domestic affairs for the first time in nearly 20 years. Freely develop your own castle town, depicted in beautifully evolved graphics.

Experience story mode for the first time in series history. Both series fans and newcomers to the Warring States and historical simulation games can enjoy this story focused on the life of Oda Nobunaga.

Watch the announcement teaser trailer below. Visit the teaser website here.

Announce Teaser Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/nobunagas-ambition-hishou-announced-for-ps5-switch-2-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
